title: About Us Rehabilitation & Care | Ayurgreen Hospital
desc: Ayurgreen Hospital is India's leading integrated ortho-neuro rehabilitation hospital combining advanced robotic technology, physiotherapy, and authentic Ayurveda.

headings.text: Redefining the Standard of Global Neuro Rehabilitation

content: Ayurgreen Hospital stands at the apex of medical innovation, merging precise robotic interventions with ancient, profound Ayurvedic science. For over a decade, we have challenged the conventional limits of recovery. By introducing India's first fully robotic integrated neuro pathway, we have successfully treated over 10,000 catastrophic cases from more than 50 countries. Our philosophy is simple: Recovery should not be a fragmented journey. By bringing world-class robotic engineers, elite physiotherapists, leading neurologists, and traditional Ayurveda scholars into a singular, cohesive ecosystem, we maximize neuroplasticity and systemic regeneration.

title: Acupuncture Rehabilitation & Care | Ayurgreen Hospital
desc: Fine-needle neural stimulation to reduce chronic pain states, restore local blood circulation, and activate sensory pathways.
content: Fine-needle neural stimulation to reduce chronic pain states, restore local blood circulation, and activate sensory pathways. At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide an integrated rehabilitation approach for Acupuncture designed to maximize functional recovery and systemic rejuvenation. By combining state-of-the-art robotic assistive technologies, evidence-based physiotherapy, and authentic traditional Kerala Ayurveda, our multidisciplinary team addresses both structural and biochemical pathways to promote deep neural healing. Each patient receives a customized treatment protocol mapped directly to their baseline assessment and functional goals. Our clinicians, therapists, and Ayurvedic scholars collaborate daily to adjust therapies, ensuring safe progression, spasticity reduction, and optimal functional autonomy. Our therapy modules address specific functional deficits and biological healing targets for optimal progress. Early intervention focused on stabilizing deficits, reducing cellular swelling, and preventing muscle wasting. Intensive therapy modules targeting long-term recovery of motor coordination, balance, and independence. Customized training using assistive technologies to adapt tasks and restore everyday activities. Specialized therapies coordinated daily by our integrated clinical panel. Tailored Ayurvedic purification treatments to remove cellular metabolic toxins, calm nerve inflammation, and restore biochemical equilibrium. Evidence-based active exercises and sensory feedback training to rebuild damaged motor pathways and improve joint ranges. High-repetition sensor-guided movement training to trigger neuroplasticity and build new coordinate loops around brain lesions. Harnessing advanced feedback systems and traditional biological therapies to support recovery. Exoskeletons and gait trainers providing highly repeatable, precise movements to stimulate spinal and cortical pathways. Targeted muscle loading, balance retraining, and proprioception drills using premium dynamic assessment platforms. Time-tested organic formulations and specialized warm oil sudations acting directly on motor system biology. Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. Find answers to key details about the Acupuncture program. Our recovery protocol for Acupuncture combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. title: Robotic Rehabilitation Rehabilitation & Care | Ayurgreen Hospital
desc: High-repetition, sensor-guided exoskeleton therapy designed to accelerate motor learning and rebuild walking patterns.
content: India's most advanced robotic gait trainers and arm rehabilitation systems providing exact, sensor-guided, high-repetition movement. Human therapists can physically guide a patient through perhaps 100 foot steps per session. Our advanced exoskeletons can guide them through perfectly synchronized 1,000+ steps. This massive repetition of correct biometric movement is the core secret to rewiring the damaged brain. Equipped with intelligent bio-sensors, our robots detect exactly how much effort the patient is producing, and automatically provide just enough assistance to complete the movement, forcing active patient participation rather than passive motion. Real-time visual graphs on screens in front of the patient display their active participation and muscle engagement, creating immediate cognitive feedback loops. Enabling mass-practice of movement protocols mathematically impossible through manual therapy alone.

title: Virtual Reality Rehabilitation & Care | Ayurgreen Hospital
desc: Immersive cognitive and sensory retraining utilizing advanced virtual reality software to promote rapid neural plastic growth.
content: Immersive cognitive and sensory retraining utilizing advanced virtual reality software to promote rapid neural plastic growth. At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide an integrated rehabilitation approach for Virtual Reality designed to maximize functional recovery and systemic rejuvenation. By combining state-of-the-art robotic assistive technologies, evidence-based physiotherapy, and authentic traditional Kerala Ayurveda, our multidisciplinary team addresses both structural and biochemical pathways to promote deep neural healing. Each patient receives a customized treatment protocol mapped directly to their baseline assessment and functional goals. Our clinicians, therapists, and Ayurvedic scholars collaborate daily to adjust therapies, ensuring safe progression, spasticity reduction, and optimal functional autonomy. Our therapy modules address specific functional deficits and biological healing targets for optimal progress. Early intervention focused on stabilizing deficits, reducing cellular swelling, and preventing muscle wasting. Intensive therapy modules targeting long-term recovery of motor coordination, balance, and independence. Customized training using assistive technologies to adapt tasks and restore everyday activities. Specialized therapies coordinated daily by our integrated clinical panel. Tailored Ayurvedic purification treatments to remove cellular metabolic toxins, calm nerve inflammation, and restore biochemical equilibrium. Evidence-based active exercises and sensory feedback training to rebuild damaged motor pathways and improve joint ranges. High-repetition sensor-guided movement training to trigger neuroplasticity and build new coordinate loops around brain lesions. Harnessing advanced feedback systems and traditional biological therapies to support recovery. Exoskeletons and gait trainers providing highly repeatable, precise movements to stimulate spinal and cortical pathways. Targeted muscle loading, balance retraining, and proprioception drills using premium dynamic assessment platforms. Time-tested organic formulations and specialized warm oil sudations acting directly on motor system biology. Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.
